spannerplan.structural_signature.v1
0||Distributed Union|distribution_table=AlbumsByAlbumTitle;execution_method=Row|Split Range:(STARTS_WITH($AlbumTitle, 'T') AND ($AlbumTitle LIKE 'T%e'))
1||Distributed Cross Apply|execution_method=Row|Split Range:(($SingerId' = $SingerId) AND ($AlbumId' = $AlbumId))
2|Input|Create Batch|execution_method=Row|
3||Local Distributed Union|execution_method=Row|
4||Compute Struct|execution_method=Row|
5||Filter Scan|execution_method=Row|Residual Condition:($AlbumTitle LIKE 'T%e')
6||Index Scan|execution_method=Row;scan_target=AlbumsByAlbumTitle|Seek Condition:STARTS_WITH($AlbumTitle, 'T')
2|Map|Serialize Result|execution_method=Row|
3||Cross Apply|execution_method=Row|
4|Input|KeyRangeAccumulator|execution_method=Row|
5||Batch Scan|execution_method=Row;scan_target=$v2|
4|Map|Local Distributed Union|execution_method=Row|
5||Filter Scan|execution_method=Row|
6||Table Scan|execution_method=Row;scan_target=Albums|Seek Condition:(($SingerId' = $batched_SingerId) AND ($AlbumId' = $batched_AlbumId))
